chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-947 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 8097/19 2. For orders on M.A 8098/19 3. For orders on M.A 8099/19 04.10.2019. Mr. Yasir Hussain Malik, Advocate for applicant along with applicant. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl. P.G. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. By means of this application, applicant, who has been granted protective bail for seven days till 7th of this month, seeks extension on the ground that due to serious threats by the complainant party, who are in majority in District Sanghar, and due to which applicant and his entire family including his sister, who was posted as Medical Officer, PPHI has resigned from her service and they have shifted to Hyderabad and therefore, he (applicant) would not be able to appear before the trial court till 7th of this month. In the facts and circumstances, the learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh, who is present in court in other cases has waived notice of this application and has recorded no objection. In view of above, the applicant is granted further extension of five in protective bail against the surety viz. Rs.50,000/-, which has already been deposited on his behalf. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of further five days on 12.10.2019 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
